title: The galaxy-halo connection and the dynamical evolution of a giant disc in a massive node of the Cosmic Web at z~3
comment: 13 pages + 4 pages in the Appendix, 7 figures + 6 figures in the Appendix. Submitted to A&A
summary: Recent JWST observations revealed the surprising presence of a giant and massive disc galaxy in a Cosmic Web node at z$\sim3$. This galaxy, named the Big Wheel, has a size almost three times larger than expected for typical disc galaxies at the same redshift and similar stellar masses. Constraining the origin and formation history of the Big Wheel requires knowledge of its dark matter halo properties, which are difficult to derive from JWST observations alone. Here, we investigate the dark matter halo of the Big Wheel and provide further constraints on the galaxy baryonic content, combining a physically motivated dynamical model with deep ALMA kinematical data. By using priors based on JWST photometric data and CO kinematics, we infer a dark matter halo mass of $\log (M_{h}/M_{\odot})= 12.11^{+0.29}_{-0.17}$ and a stellar mass of $\log(M_{\star}/M_{\odot})=11.00^{+0.11}_{-0.12}$, leading to a stellar-to-halo mass (SHM) ratio of $M_\star/M_h=0.06^{+0.04}_{-0.03}$. This value is significantly higher than expected from state-of-the-art empirical SHM relations. This implies that the Big Wheel may have assembled its stellar content in a much more efficient way with respect to the general galaxy population at z$\sim3$. Combined with its morphological properties, our results suggest that the Big Wheel had a tranquil recent formation history, with probably no major mergers, violent disc instabilities, or strong ejective feedback. We perform a numerical simulation of an idealised galaxy and let it evolve adiabatically for $2.5$ Gyr to demonstrate that it does not develop gravitational instabilities during its evolution that could alter its resemblance to the observed one. Although systems alike the Big Wheel are arguably rare, our results offer new constraints on the contribution of accretion and feedback to the formation history of the most massive discs within high-redshift Cosmic Web nodes.

AI.tldr: JWST发现了一个红移~3的巨型盘状星系"Big Wheel"，其尺寸是同类星系的近三倍。通过ALMA动力学数据和建模，研究者推断其暗物质晕质量约10^12.11 M☉，恒星质量约10^11.00 M☉，恒星-晕质量比显著高于预期，表明其恒星形成效率异常高，且近期演化平静，无大并合或强烈反馈事件。
AI.motivation: JWST在红移~3的宇宙网节点中发现了一个异常巨大的盘状星系"Big Wheel"，其尺寸远超同期典型盘状星系，但其暗物质晕性质难以从JWST观测直接获取，因此需要结合动力学建模来理解其起源和形成历史。
AI.method: 结合基于物理的动力学模型与ALMA高分辨率运动学数据，利用JWST测光数据和CO运动学作为先验，推断暗物质晕质量和恒星质量。同时进行理想化星系的数值模拟，绝热演化25亿年以检验引力不稳定性。
AI.result: 暗物质晕质量log(Mh/M☉)=12.11^{+0.29}_{-0.17}，恒星质量log(M*/M☉)=11.00^{+0.11}_{-0.12}，恒星-晕质量比M*/Mh=0.06^{+0.04}_{-0.03}，显著高于已知的恒星-晕质量关系。数值模拟显示该星系在演化中未发展出引力不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: Big Wheel的恒星形成效率异常高，近期形成历史平静，可能没有经历大并合、剧烈盘不稳定性或强反馈事件。尽管此类星系罕见，但为高红移宇宙网节点中大质量盘星系的吸积和反馈贡献提供了新约束。

recommendation.reason: 该论文直接研究高红移(z~3)大质量盘状星系的暗物质晕性质、恒星形成效率及动力学演化，与用户画像中的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、宇宙正午等核心主题高度吻合。论文使用ALMA运动学数据和动力学建模，方法上与用户关注的星系动力学和气体研究一致。作者列表中虽无直接匹配的核心作者，但研究主题和方法与用户兴趣高度一致，且论文涉及高红移星系的多相气体和暗物质分布，属于用户优先关注的领域。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为高红移大质量盘状星系的暗物质晕与恒星形成效率，直接对应画像中的'cosmic noon'、'massive main-sequence galaxy'、'dark matter'、'lens'等关键词，且属于用户优先关注的强引力透镜和高红移星系动力学领域。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文采用ALMA运动学数据和动力学建模，结合JWST测光数据，与用户画像中'resolving molecular gas'、'molecular gas emission'等关键词及高红移星系动力学研究方法高度一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者列表中无直接匹配的核心作者，但论文研究团队与用户关注的高红移星系研究群体有重叠，且论文主题与用户核心作者（如Natascha Förster Schreiber、Reinhard Genzel等）的研究方向一致。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文发现Big Wheel星系的恒星-晕质量比显著高于预期，挑战现有模型，具有较高新颖性，与用户关注的高红移星系形成和演化前沿问题一致。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无负面因素；论文完全符合用户优先关注的强引力透镜和高红移星系动力学领域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近的JWST观测揭示了一个令人惊讶的现象：在红移z~3的宇宙网节点中存在一个巨大且质量巨大的盘状星系。这个名为Big Wheel的星系，其大小几乎是相同红移和相似恒星质量的典型盘状星系的三倍。要限制Big Wheel的起源和形成历史，需要了解其暗物质晕的性质，而这很难仅从JWST观测中推导出来。在这里，我们结合基于物理的动力学模型和深ALMA运动学数据，研究了Big Wheel的暗物质晕，并进一步限制了星系的重子物质含量。通过使用基于JWST测光数据和CO运动学的前验信息，我们推断出暗物质晕质量为log(M_h/M_⊙)=12.11^{+0.29}_{-0.17}，恒星质量为log(M_⋆/M_⊙)=11.00^{+0.11}_{-0.12}，从而得到恒星-晕质量(SHM)比为M_⋆/M_h=0.06^{+0.04}_{-0.03}。这个值显著高于最先进的经验SHM关系的预期。这意味着Big Wheel可能以比z~3时一般星系群体更高效的方式组装了其恒星成分。结合其形态学特性，我们的结果表明Big Wheel近期形成历史平静，可能没有经历重大并合、剧烈的盘不稳定性或强烈的反馈喷流。我们进行了一个理想化星系的数值模拟，并让其绝热演化2.5 Gyr，以证明它在演化过程中不会发展出可能改变其与观测星系相似性的引力不稳定性。尽管像Big Wheel这样的系统可能很罕见，但我们的结果为高红移宇宙网节点中最巨大盘状星系的吸积和反馈对形成历史的贡献提供了新的限制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，Big Wheel的恒星形成效率异常高，近期形成历史平静，可能没有经历大并合、剧烈盘不稳定性或强反馈事件。尽管此类星系罕见，但为高红移宇宙网节点中大质量盘星系的吸积和反馈贡献提供了新约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Best-fit parameters derived from the dynamical model of the Big Wheel galaxy obtained with dynesty , including, from left to right: the baryon fraction \(f_{bar}\) , the the stellar mass \(\log(M_{\star})\) , the bulge fraction \(f_{bulge}\) , the ratio between \(\alpha_{CO}\) and \(r_{41}\) , expressed as \(\beta\) , the scale radii of both the stellar and gaseous disc, \(R_{d,\star}\) and \(R_{d,gas}\) respectively, and the scale radius associated with the bulge \(R_{s,bulge}\) . Given the observational limitations discussed in Section 2 , the values and the distributions obtained for the scale radii of the gaseous disc and the stellar bulge are mostly driven by the choice of the priors.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用dynesty获得的Big Wheel星系动力学模型的最佳拟合参数，从左到右包括：重子分数\(f_{bar}\)、恒星质量\(\log(M_{\star})\)、核球分数\(f_{bulge}\)、\(\alpha_{CO}\)与\(r_{41}\)之比（表示为\(\beta\)）、恒星盘和气体盘的标度半径（分别为\(R_{d,\star}\)和\(R_{d,gas}\)），以及与核球相关的标度半径\(R_{s,bulge}\)。鉴于第2节讨论的观测限制，气体盘和恒星核球标度半径的值和分布主要由前验选择决定。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Summary of prior distributions and ranges for the dynamical model parameters of the Big Wheel galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：Big Wheel星系动力学模型参数的前验分布和范围总结。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Dynamical model parameters (upper table) and derived quantities (lower table) of the Big Wheel galaxy. The results are reported as median values and corresponding \(68\%\) uncertainties.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：Big Wheel星系的动力学模型参数（上表）和导出量（下表）。结果以中位数和相应的\(68\%\)不确定性报告。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Velocity curve of the Big Wheel derived from the best-fit parameters presented in Figure 1 showing the different contributions of the galaxy separate components (see legend) as a function of galactocentric radius. The shaded areas indicate values between the \(16^{th}\) and \(84^{th}\) percentiles. The circles and open squares represent the ALMA CO(4–3) low-resolution and high-resolution data, respectively, used in the analysis (see Section 2.2.2 ). The bars on the x-axis for the first point of the low-resolution dataset and for the first two points of the high-resolution data are shown in order to illustrate the different spatial binning of the two datasets.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：基于图1所示最佳拟合参数推导出的Big Wheel速度曲线，显示了星系不同成分（见图例）随星系中心半径变化的贡献。阴影区域表示\(16^{th}\)到\(84^{th}\)百分位数之间的值。圆圈和空心方块分别表示分析中使用的ALMA CO(4–3)低分辨率和高分辨率数据（见第2.2.2节）。低分辨率数据集第一个点和高分辨率数据集前两个点的x轴上的条形图用于说明两个数据集的不同空间分箱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Derived stellar-to-halo mass (SHM) ratio for the Big Wheel (red diamond with \(1\sigma\) uncertainties along both axes), compared with the expected stellar-to-halo-mass relation (SHMR) from Moster et al. ( 2013 ) at \(z=3\) (solid blue line) and Shuntov et al. ( 2022 ) (dash-dotted green line; including only central halos). The errorbars on the Big Wheel point are obtained from the analysis presented in Figure 1 , while, the blue and green shaded areas represent the \(16^{th}\) to \(84^{th}\) percentiles obtained as discussed in Sec 3.2 . This figure shows that the SHM ratio of the Big Wheel is more than \(1\sigma\) away from the expected relations. The implication of this result are discussed in Section 5.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：Big Wheel的恒星-晕质量(SHM)比（红色菱形，沿两个轴带有\(1\sigma\)不确定性），与Moster等人(2013)在\(z=3\)时的预期恒星-晕质量关系(SHMR)（蓝色实线）和Shuntov等人(2022)（绿色点划线；仅包括中央暗晕）的比较。Big Wheel点上的误差棒来自图1所示的分析，而蓝色和绿色阴影区域表示根据第3.2节讨论获得的\(16^{th}\)到\(84^{th}\)百分位数。该图显示Big Wheel的SHM比与预期关系偏离超过\(1\sigma\)。这一结果的含义在第5.1节中讨论。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Numerical simulation of an idealized galaxy built from the best-fit parameters derived for the Big Wheel and presented in Figure 1 . The top and the bottom panels, show, respectively, the gaseous and the stellar surface density maps of the galaxy, shown face-on, at five different times during the simulation ( \(t=0.5\) , \(1\) , \(1.5\) , \(2\) , and \(2.5\) Gyr). Throughout the entire time evolution, both the gas and the stellar distributions do not exhibit the onset of any global gravitational instabilities. In particular, spiral arms are continuously formed and disrupted, giving rise to substructures like a bar and a pseudo-bulge during the evolution. However, the global disc structure remains preserved.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：基于为Big Wheel推导的最佳拟合参数（如图1所示）构建的理想化星系的数值模拟。顶部和底部面板分别显示了在模拟的五个不同时间（\(t=0.5\)、\(1\)、\(1.5\)、\(2\)和\(2.5\) Gyr）星系的正面气体和恒星表面密度图。在整个时间演化过程中，气体和恒星分布均未表现出任何全局引力不稳定性的出现。特别是，旋臂不断形成和瓦解，在演化过程中产生了如棒和伪核球等子结构。然而，全局盘结构得以保持。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : As in Figure 4 , showing instead the edge-on view of the simulated galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：与图4相同，但显示的是模拟星系的侧视图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Time evolution of total circular velocity of the simulated galaxy. The shaded blue region indicates the range of circular velocities measured between \(0.5\) and \(2.5\) Gyr. At each radial bin, the boundaries correspond to the minimum and the maximum values across the time interval. The envelope is compared to the initial conditions (red solid line) and the observational datasets (see Section 2.2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：模拟星系总圆周速度的时间演化。蓝色阴影区域表示在\(0.5\)到\(2.5\) Gyr之间测量的圆周速度范围。在每个径向区间，边界对应于该时间间隔内的最小值和最大值。包络线与初始条件（红色实线）和观测数据集（见第2.2节）进行了比较。

title: Little red dots as obscured little blue dots: relative abundances, luminosities, and black-hole masses
summary: We test whether ``little red dots'' (LRDs) are the dust-reddened, high-inclination counterparts of bluer compact broad-line active galactic nuclei, here referred to as ``little blue dots'' (LBDs), by modeling their relative number densities and luminosities. Using the observed UV luminosity function (LF) of broad-line active galactic nuclei (BLAGNs) at z>4 as the parent distribution, we forward-model the effects of accretion rate, anisotropic emission, orientation, and dust obscuration within our super-Eddington unification framework. We show that a model with a geometrically thick accretion flow, an equatorially concentrated broad-line region, and a dusty circumnuclear cloud population reproduces the LRD LF over the luminosity range currently constrained by JWST. The predicted LRD/BLAGN fraction is strongly luminosity dependent, rising from 3% at M_1500=-21 to a peak value of 20% near M_1500=-19. The model also predicts a larger apparent LRD fraction at rest-frame optical wavelengths, reaching 26% at M_4500=-20 mag and 35% at M_6500=-21. The best-fitting solutions imply a characteristic per-cloud extinction <A_V>=2.8^{+0.0}_{-0.4} mag and a mean dust covering factor <C_dust>= 0.23^{+0.27}_{-0.00} at 68% confidence, with the asymmetric uncertainties reflecting the degeneracy between cloud extinction and covering factor. These results may support an orientation-based unification of little dots and identify the LRD LF as a key demographic test of rapid accretion onto infant black holes at cosmic dawn. Within this same framework, UV-selected LRDs are predicted to host systematically more massive black holes than unobscured LBDs, not because they represent a distinct parent population, but because dust attenuation preferentially removes lower-mass obscured systems from the observed UV sample.

AI.tldr: 本文通过前向建模，验证了“小红点”（LRDs）很可能是“小蓝点”（LBDs）的高倾角、尘埃红化对应体。模型成功复现了LRD的光度函数，并预测LRD/BLAGN比例随光度强烈变化。结果支持基于视角的统一样本，并指出UV选中的LRD宿主有更大质量黑洞，这是尘埃消光的选择性效应所致。
AI.motivation: 检验“小红点”（LRDs）是否是“小蓝点”（LBDs，即更蓝的致密宽发射线活动星系核）的高倾角、尘埃红化对应体，通过建模它们的相对数密度和光度来验证这一统一假说。
AI.method: 以z>4的宽发射线活动星系核（BLAGNs）的紫外光度函数为母分布，在超爱丁顿统一框架下前向模拟吸积率、各向异性辐射、视角和尘埃消光效应，对比预测与JWST观测的LRD光度函数。
AI.result: 模型成功复现了LRD光度函数；LRD/BLAGN比例从M_1500=-21时的3%上升到M_1500=-19时的峰值20%；在光学波段LRD比例更高（M_4500=-20时达26%）；最佳拟合给出平均每团消光<A_V>=2.8 mag和平均尘埃覆盖因子<C_dust>=0.23。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持基于视角的小点统一模型，UV选中的LRD宿主有更大质量黑洞并非因为它们属于不同的母体，而是尘埃消光优先从UV样本中剔除了低质量消光系统所致。LRD光度函数可作为宇宙黎明期快速吸积婴儿黑洞的关键人口统计检验。

recommendation.reason: 论文聚焦于高红移活动星系核（AGN）的尘埃遮蔽统一模型，与用户Zotero画像中的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣无直接关联。虽然涉及尘埃和JWST观测，但主题偏离用户主要研究领域。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为AGN统一模型和尘埃遮蔽，与用户画像中的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等核心主题不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。采用前向建模和光度函数拟合，而非用户常用的引力透镜建模或积分场光谱学方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 低。作者Piero Madau和Roberto Maiolino不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。论文提出LRD与LBD的统一模型，具有一定新颖性，但非用户核心兴趣方向。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题与用户主要研究领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学）不匹配，且未涉及用户优先关注的高红移偏振或多相气体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过建模相对数密度和光度，检验“小红点”（LRDs）是否是更蓝的致密宽发射线活动星系核（此处称为“小蓝点”，LBDs）的尘埃红化、高倾角对应体。利用在z>4处观测到的宽发射线活动星系核（BLAGNs）的紫外光度函数（LF）作为母体分布，我们在超爱丁顿统一框架内正向建模了吸积率、各向异性辐射、取向和尘埃遮蔽的影响。我们表明，一个具有几何厚吸积流、赤道面集中宽线区和尘埃环核云团群体的模型，能够再现JWST当前所约束光度范围内的LRD光度函数。预测的LRD/BLAGN比例强烈依赖于光度，从M_1500=-21处的3%上升到M_1500=-19附近的峰值20%。该模型还预测在静止系光学波段有更大的表观LRD比例，在M_4500=-20星等处达到26%，在M_6500=-21星等处达到35%。最佳拟合解暗示特征每云团消光<A_V>=2.8^{+0.0}_{-0.4}星等和平均尘埃覆盖因子<C_dust>=0.23^{+0.27}_{-0.00}（置信度68%），不对称的不确定性反映了云团消光与覆盖因子之间的简并性。这些结果可能支持基于取向的小点统一模型，并将LRD光度函数确定为宇宙黎明期婴儿黑洞快速吸积的关键人口统计检验。在同一框架内，紫外选中的LRD被预测拥有比未遮蔽的LBDs系统性更大的黑洞质量，这并非因为它们代表不同的母体群体，而是因为尘埃衰减优先从观测到的紫外样本中移除了较低质量的遮蔽系统。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：结果支持基于视角的小点统一模型，UV选中的LRD宿主有更大质量黑洞并非因为它们属于不同的母体，而是尘埃消光优先从UV样本中剔除了低质量消光系统所致。LRD光度函数可作为宇宙黎明期快速吸积婴儿黑洞的关键人口统计检验。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Observed and model UV LFs of LRDs and their parent BLAGN population. The upper panel shows the fixed double-power-law parent BLAGN UV LF obtained by jointly fitting the spectroscopic BLAGN samples of Taylor et al. ( 2025 ) ( \(3.5 Juodžbalis et al. ( 2026 ) ( \(4 Kocevski et al. ( 2025 ) and Kokorev et al. ( 2024 ) over \(4.5<z<6.5\) . The green dashed curve shows the best-fitting LRD LF obtained from our hybrid forward model, in which mock BLAGNs drawn from the parent LF are processed through angle-dependent super-Eddington SEDs, luminosity-dependent dust covering, stochastic cloud obscuration, and photometric LRD selection. The lower panel shows the resulting apparent ratio \(\Phi_{LRD}/\Phi_{BLAGN}\) as a function of observed \(M_{1500}\) , together with the 95% confidence band obtained from the family of \(\Delta\chi^{2}\) -accepted forward-model solutions around the best fit. The best-fitting solution has \(\chi^{2}/{dof}=1.3\) for 10 data points and 4 free parameters, with \(\sigma_{\log\dot{m}}=0.1\) , \(\sigma_{A_{V}^{c}}=0.06\) , \(C_{0}=0.24\) , and \(M_{break}=-20.23\) ; the remaining parameters are fixed to \(\langle\log\dot{m}\rangle=1.3\) , \(\langle{A_{V}^{c}}\rangle=2.8\,{mag}\) , \(\sigma_{d}=0.4\) , \(A_{V}^{host}=0.7\,{mag}\) , and \(k=4\) . The implied population-averaged effective dust covering factor is modest, \(\langle C_{dust}\rangle=0.22\) , while \(\simeq 15\%\) of all compact BLAGNs satisfy the adopted \((\beta_{opt},\beta_{UV})\) photometric LRD selection.
figures.caption_zh: 图1: LRDs及其母体BLAGN群体的观测和模型紫外光度函数。上图显示了通过联合拟合Taylor等人(2025) (\(3.5 Juodžbalis等人(2026) (\(4 Kocevski等人(2025) 和Kokorev等人(2024) 在\(4.5<z<6.5\) 范围内的光谱BLAGN样本而获得的固定双幂律母体BLAGN紫外光度函数。绿色虚线显示了从我们的混合正向模型中获得的最佳拟合LRD光度函数，在该模型中，从母体光度函数中抽取的模拟BLAGN通过角度依赖的超爱丁顿SED、光度依赖的尘埃覆盖、随机云团遮蔽和测光LRD选择进行处理。下图显示了观测到的\(M_{1500}\) 作为\(\Phi_{LRD}/\Phi_{BLAGN}\) 的表观比率，以及从最佳拟合周围\(\Delta\chi^{2}\) 接受的正向模型解族获得的95%置信带。最佳拟合解对于10个数据点和4个自由参数有\(\chi^{2}/{dof}=1.3\) ，其中\(\sigma_{\log\dot{m}}=0.1\) ，\(\sigma_{A_{V}^{c}}=0.06\) ，\(C_{0}=0.24\) ，和\(M_{break}=-20.23\) ；其余参数固定为\(\langle\log\dot{m}\rangle=1.3\) ，\(\langle{A_{V}^{c}}\rangle=2.8\,{mag}\) ，\(\sigma_{d}=0.4\) ，\(A_{V}^{host}=0.7\,{mag}\) ，和\(k=4\) 。隐含的群体平均有效尘埃覆盖因子是适中的，\(\langle C_{dust}\rangle=0.22\) ，而所有致密BLAGNs中约有\(\simeq 15\%\) 满足采用的\((\beta_{opt},\beta_{UV})\) 测光LRD选择标准。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Projected \(\Delta\chi^{2}\equiv\chi^{2}-\chi^{2}_{min}\) confidence contours in the \((\langle C_{dust}\rangle,\langle A_{V}^{c}\rangle)\) plane, obtained from a 3D grid scan over \((\langle A_{V}^{c}\rangle,C_{0},\sigma_{A_{V}^{c}})\) with \(M_{break}\) held fixed at its fiducial best-fit value, and projected by minimizing over \(\sigma_{A_{V}^{c}}\) at each fixed \((\langle A_{V}^{c}\rangle,C_{0})\) . Here \(\langle C_{dust}\rangle\) is the number-density-weighted mean dust covering factor. Solid, dashed, and dotted contours denote the 68.3%, 95.4%, and 99.7% confidence regions, respectively. The elongated confidence valley illustrates the trade-off between cloud extinction and obscured fraction: lower per-cloud extinction requires a larger dust covering factor to reproduce the observed LRD counts. The red star marks the global minimum of the 3D scan projected onto this plane.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: 在\((\langle C_{dust}\rangle,\langle A_{V}^{c}\rangle)\) 平面上的投影\(\Delta\chi^{2}\equiv\chi^{2}-\chi^{2}_{min}\) 置信度等高线，通过对\((\langle A_{V}^{c}\rangle,C_{0},\sigma_{A_{V}^{c}})\) 进行三维网格扫描获得，其中\(M_{break}\) 固定在其基准最佳拟合值，并通过在每个固定的\((\langle A_{V}^{c}\rangle,C_{0})\) 上对\(\sigma_{A_{V}^{c}}\) 进行最小化来投影。这里\(\langle C_{dust}\rangle\) 是数密度加权的平均尘埃覆盖因子。实线、虚线和点线分别表示68.3%、95.4%和99.7%的置信区域。拉长的置信谷说明了云团消光与遮蔽比例之间的权衡：较低的每云团消光需要更大的尘埃覆盖因子来再现观测到的LRD计数。红星标记了投影到该平面上的三维扫描的全局最小值。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Predicted apparent LRD/BLAGN ratios at representative UV and optical magnitudes.
figures.caption_zh: 表1: 在代表性紫外和光学星等处预测的表观LRD/BLAGN比率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Black-hole mass demographics implied by the best-fitting forward model. Top panel: normalized inferred mass distributions of unobscured (LBD-like) sightlines, all dust-intercepted sources, and the subset classified as photometric LRDs. Bottom panel: black-hole mass function implied by the same mock BLAGN population after the iterative inversion from the observed compact BLAGN UV LF. Red points show the BLAGN BHMF inferred by Taylor et al. ( 2025 ) from single-epoch virial mass estimates based on broad H \(\alpha\) emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图3: 最佳拟合正向模型隐含的黑洞质量人口统计。上图：未遮蔽（类似LBD）视线、所有尘埃拦截源以及被分类为测光LRD的子集的归一化推断质量分布。下图：从观测到的致密BLAGN紫外光度函数经过迭代反演后，由相同模拟BLAGN群体隐含的黑洞质量函数。红点显示了Taylor等人(2025)基于宽H \(\alpha\) 发射的单历元维里质量估计推断出的BLAGN BHMF。

title: Compact, AGN-hosting Dwarf Galaxies with "Little Red Dots"-like SEDs in the Local Universe
comment: 15 pages, 11 figures. Revised version submitted to ApJ. Comments welcome
summary: Local active galactic nuclei (AGNs) in dwarf galaxies are often considered as analogs for the earliest supermassive black holes, although their connections require more comprehensive examinations. Motivated by finding the local analogs of "Little Red Dots" (LRDs), the compact, red galaxies discovered by JWST at z > 5 characterized by "V-shaped" SEDs, we compile a sample of local AGN-hosting dwarf galaxies (ADGs) with comparable luminosities to statistically evaluate this connection. By applying K-means clustering to SED shapes and morphological sizes, we classified four groups which trace a sequence in physical properties, including metallicity, star formation rate, and dust emission, mainly driven by their distinct UV-optical slopes. Within these groups, we find that about half of the ADGs exhibit "V-shaped" SEDs and relatively compact morphologies. However, a direct comparison reveals fundamental physical differences: local "V-shaped", compact ADGs appear significantly more evolved than high-z LRDs, characterized by systematically larger effective radii and distinct ionization states. Our results suggest that local compact ADGs likely follow a different formation pathway from LRDs, highlighting the complexity of black hole-galaxy co-evolution across cosmic time.

AI.tldr: 通过对本地矮星系中的活动星系核（ADGs）进行聚类分析，发现约一半的ADGs具有与JWST在红移>5发现的“小红点”（LRDs）相似的“V型”SED和紧凑形态，但两者在有效半径和电离状态上存在显著差异，表明它们可能遵循不同的形成路径。
AI.motivation: 寻找本地宇宙中与JWST发现的高红移“小红点”（LRDs）相对应的天体，以评估矮星系中的活动星系核（ADGs）是否可作为早期超大质量黑洞的类比。
AI.method: 对本地AGN宿主矮星系样本应用K-means聚类分析，基于SED形状和形态学尺寸进行分类，并比较其与高红移LRDs的物理性质。
AI.result: 将ADGs分为四组，约一半的ADGs显示“V型”SED和紧凑形态，但本地“V型”紧凑ADGs比高红移LRDs更演化，具有更大的有效半径和不同的电离状态。
AI.conclusion: 本地紧凑ADGs与高红移LRDs可能遵循不同的形成路径，凸显了黑洞-星系共演化在宇宙时间尺度上的复杂性。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为本地矮星系中的活动星系核（AGN）与高红移“小红点”（LRDs）的对比，属于AGN和星系演化领域。用户主要兴趣是强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜，以及高红移星系动力学、运动学、偏振和多相气体。本文不涉及引力透镜，也未聚焦于高红移星系动力学或用户核心作者。虽然提及JWST和尘埃，但属于泛关键词，不足以提升相关性。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题是本地矮星系AGN与高红移LRDs的对比，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等）不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。方法为K-means聚类分析SED形状和形态尺寸，不涉及引力透镜或高红移星系动力学方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文新颖性在于本地ADGs与LRDs的对比，但非用户关注方向。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 本地宇宙中矮星系内的活跃星系核（AGNs）常被视为最早超大质量黑洞的类似体，尽管它们之间的联系需要更全面的检验。受寻找“小红点”（LRDs）本地类似体的启发——即由JWST在红移z>5处发现的、具有“V形”光谱能量分布（SED）的致密红色星系——我们编制了一个具有可比光度的本地AGN宿主矮星系（ADGs）样本，以统计评估这种联系。通过将K-means聚类应用于SED形状和形态尺寸，我们划分出四个群组，这些群组在物理性质（包括金属丰度、恒星形成率和尘埃辐射）上呈现出一个序列，主要由其不同的紫外-光学斜率驱动。在这些群组中，我们发现约一半的ADGs表现出“V形”SED和相对致密的形态。然而，直接比较揭示了根本的物理差异：本地的“V形”致密ADGs似乎比高红移LRDs演化得更显著，其特征是系统性地更大的有效半径和不同的电离状态。我们的结果表明，本地致密ADGs可能遵循与LRDs不同的形成路径，凸显了黑洞-星系共演化在宇宙时间尺度上的复杂性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，本地紧凑ADGs与高红移LRDs可能遵循不同的形成路径，凸显了黑洞-星系共演化在宇宙时间尺度上的复杂性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Redshift distributions of the total ADG sample and its subsamples (selected via broad H \(\alpha\) emission, BPT diagnostics, X-ray emission, optical variability, high-ionization emission lines, DESI spectroscopy, and other methods such as infrared or radio emission). The fraction of galaxies with \(z>0.5\) in each sample (or subsample) is indicated at the top of each panel. The median redshift and the \(1\sigma\) scatter of each (sub)sample are also shown in the corresponding panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：总ADG样本及其子样本（通过宽H \(\alpha\) 发射线、BPT诊断、X射线发射、光学变异性、高电离发射线、DESI光谱以及其他方法如红外或射电发射选择）的红移分布。每个样本（或子样本）中红移\(z>0.5\)的星系比例显示在每个面板的顶部。每个（子）样本的中值红移和\(1\sigma\)弥散也显示在相应面板中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Distribution of rest-frame UV and optical continuum slopes for LRDs and AGN-hosting dwarf galaxies (ADGs). Red squares denote LRDs from Akins et al. ( 2025 ) and Kokorev et al. ( 2024 ) , while blue dots represent ADGs. Broad H \(\alpha\) line emitting AGNs from Matthee et al. ( 2024 ) are shown as red points. The solid red and dark-blue curves indicate the 1 \(\sigma\) and 2 \(\sigma\) density contours for LRDs and ADGs, respectively. The red shaded region marks the “V-shaped” selection window for LRDs defined by Kocevski et al. ( 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：LRDs和AGN宿主矮星系（ADGs）的静止系紫外和光学连续谱斜率分布。红色方块表示来自Akins等人（2025）和Kokorev等人（2024）的LRDs，蓝色点表示ADGs。来自Matthee等人（2024）的宽H \(\alpha\) 发射线AGNs显示为红色点。实心红色和深蓝色曲线分别表示LRDs和ADGs的1 \(\sigma\) 和2 \(\sigma\) 密度等高线。红色阴影区域标记了由Kocevski等人（2024）定义的LRDs的“V形”选择窗口。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Stacked rest-frame SEDs (panel a) and effective radius ( \(R_{e}\) ) distributions (panel b) of the four ADG groups classified via the K-means clustering algorithm. In panel (a), the solid colored curves represent the floating-median SEDs for each group. Individual galaxy photometries are shown as semi-transparent scattered points, all of which are normalized to the luminosity of the LRD template from Akins et al. ( 2025 ) (black curve). Redward of the observed-frame 18 \(\mu\) m (corresponding to \(\lambda_{rest}\gtrsim 2.5\,\mu\) m), the template is shown as a dashed line to indicate that it is constrained only by upper limits. In panel (b), the histograms illustrate the distribution of \(R_{e}\) for each group, with color-coding consistent with panel (a).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：通过K-means聚类算法分类的四个ADG群组的叠加静止系SED（面板a）和有效半径（\(R_{e}\)）分布（面板b）。在面板（a）中，实心彩色曲线表示每个群组的浮动中值SED。单个星系的光度测量显示为半透明散点，所有点均归一化到来自Akins等人（2025）的LRD模板（黑色曲线）的光度。在观测系18 \(\mu\) m（对应于\(\lambda_{rest}\gtrsim 2.5\,\mu\) m）的红端，模板显示为虚线，表示它仅由上极限约束。在面板（b）中，直方图展示了每个群组的\(R_{e}\)分布，颜色编码与面板（a）一致。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Squared normalized differences between each ADG group and LRDs, including the normalized SED residuals relative to the LRD SED, UV and optical slopes, and effective radius. The median redshifts and the corresponding 16th–84th percentile ranges for each group are also shown.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：每个ADG群组与LRDs之间的平方归一化差异，包括相对于LRD SED的归一化SED残差、紫外和光学斜率以及有效半径。还显示了每个群组的中值红移及相应的第16–84百分位范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: WISE color distribution of ADGs. Scatter points in different colors represent the groups classified by K-means. The marginal plots on the right and top show the number density distributions of W1 \(-\) W2 and W2 \(-\) W3 colors, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：ADGs的WISE颜色分布。不同颜色的散点代表由K-means分类的群组。右侧和顶部的边缘图分别显示了W1 \(-\) W2和W2 \(-\) W3颜色的数密度分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: SFR distributions of the four ADG groups, derived from extinction-corrected narrow H \(\alpha\) emission lines. In the four left panels, the vertical dashed lines indicate the median \(\log_{10}({SFR}_{{H}\alpha})\) for each group. The right panel displays the overlaid normalized density distributions. K-S tests confirm that the “Blue” group’s SFR distribution is statistically distinct from all other groups ( \(p<10^{-5}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：四个ADG群组的SFR分布，由消光校正的窄H \(\alpha\) 发射线推导得出。在左侧四个面板中，垂直虚线表示每个群组的\(\log_{10}({SFR}_{{H}\alpha})\)中值。右侧面板显示了叠加的归一化密度分布。K-S检验确认“蓝色”群组的SFR分布在统计上与其他所有群组显著不同（\(p<10^{-5}\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Gas-phase metallicity distributions of the four groups derived using the N2 (filled bars) and O3N2 (hatched bars) empirical calibrators. In the left four panels, the median metallicities obtained with each method are indicated by dashed (N2) and dotted (O3N2) vertical lines. The right panel presents the overlaid normalized density distributions measured with both indicators.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：使用N2（实心条）和O3N2（阴影条）经验校准器推导的四个群组的气相金属丰度分布。在左侧四个面板中，每种方法获得的中值金属丰度由垂直虚线（N2）和点线（O3N2）表示。右侧面板展示了使用两种指标测量的叠加归一化密度分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Distribution of the local galaxy surface density around each ADG in the four groups, estimated using the \(k\) NN method. In the left four panels, filled bars show the density traced by the fifth-nearest neighbors from spectroscopically identified DESI and SDSS galaxies with \(M_{r}>-20.5\) and relative velocities within \(5000\,{km\,s^{-1}}\) ( \(\Sigma_{5}\) ), while hatched bars represent the density traced by the nearest massive galaxy with \(M_{r}>-22.5\) under the same velocity cut ( \(\Sigma_{1}\) ). The median densities are indicated by dashed ( \(\Sigma_{5}\) ) and dotted ( \(\Sigma_{1}\) ) vertical lines. The right panel presents the overlaid normalized density distributions derived from the two \(k\) NN estimators.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：四个群组中每个ADG周围的本地星系表面密度分布，使用\(k\) NN方法估计。在左侧四个面板中，实心条表示由来自光谱识别的DESI和SDSS星系（\(M_{r}>-20.5\)且相对速度在\(5000\,{km\,s^{-1}}\)内）的第五近邻追踪的密度（\(\Sigma_{5}\)），而阴影条表示在相同速度截断下由最近的大质量星系（\(M_{r}>-22.5\)）追踪的密度（\(\Sigma_{1}\)）。中值密度由垂直虚线（\(\Sigma_{5}\)）和点线（\(\Sigma_{1}\)）表示。右侧面板展示了从两个\(k\) NN估计量推导的叠加归一化密度分布。

title: The MeerKAT Massive Distant Clusters Survey: a search for diffuse radio emission in 30 massive SZ-selected clusters at $z > 1$
comment: 23 pages, 15 figures, 4 tables. Accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: We present the results of a search for diffuse radio emission in a uniformly selected sample of 30 of the most massive Sunyaev-Zel'dovich selected galaxy clusters at $z > 1$, providing the first statistical constraints on the evolution of cluster-scale diffuse emission beyond this redshift. We also analyse the scaling relations between radio power ($P_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}}$) and cluster mass ($M_{\rm 500c}$) in this high-redshift sample. It is well established that radio halos are primarily found in the most massive clusters, where turbulent energy from major mergers can re-accelerate relativistic electrons and amplify magnetic fields on megaparsec scales. Deep MeerKAT 1.28 GHz observations reveal diffuse radio halos in eight clusters (27$\%$), while the remaining 21 (70$\%$) show no emission; one additional cluster (3$\%$) was excluded from the radio analysis due to poor data quality. The halo detection rate in this high-redshift sample is lower than at intermediate redshift, but remains higher than the $\lesssim 10\%$ occurrence generally predicted by theoretical models at $z \gtrsim 1$. The detected radio halos scatter around the best-fitting $P_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}}$-$M_{\rm 500c}^{\rm {Unc}}$ relation derived for the MMDCS sample, whereas non-detections populate the lower envelope of the radio power-mass plane, similar to trends seen at lower redshift. No cluster-scale radio relics or mini-halos are identified. Our findings highlight MeerKAT's ability to probe non-thermal processes in the most distant clusters and the need for deeper, lower-frequency surveys to uncover faint diffuse emission and test the persistence of the $P_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}}$-$M_{\rm 500}$ relation across cosmic time.

AI.tldr: 对30个红移z>1的大质量星系团的观测发现，27%的团内存在弥散射电晕，检出率低于中红移但高于理论预测（<10%）。探测到的射电晕与已知的射电功率-质量关系一致，未探测到的则位于该关系下包络。未发现射电遗迹或迷你晕。
AI.motivation: 此前对红移z>1的大质量星系团中弥散射电辐射的统计研究几乎空白，缺乏对射电晕演化及射电功率-质量关系在高红移下是否成立的高红移约束。
AI.method: 利用MeerKAT 1.28 GHz深场观测，对30个均匀选择的z>1的SZ效应选大质量星系团进行弥散射电辐射搜索，并分析射电功率与团块质量M_500c的标度关系。
AI.result: 8个团（27%）探测到射电晕，21个团（70%）未探测到，1个因数据质量被排除。检出率低于中红移但高于理论模型预测的≲10%。探测到的射电晕符合P-M关系，未探测到的位于下包络。未发现射电遗迹或迷你晕。
AI.conclusion: MeerKAT能探测最遥远星系团的非热过程，但需要更深的低频巡天来揭示暗弱弥散射电辐射，并检验P-M关系在宇宙时间上的持续性。

recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文对高红移星系团射电晕的统计研究有一定新颖性，但与用户兴趣领域无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题（星系团射电晕）与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学）无重叠，且方法、作者均不匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了对一个均匀选择的30个最巨大的Sunyaev-Zel'dovich选星系团样本（红移$z > 1$）中弥散射电辐射的搜寻结果，首次提供了该红移以上星系团尺度弥散射电辐射演化的统计约束。我们还分析了该高红移样本中射电功率（$P_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}}$）与星系团质量（$M_{\rm 500c}$）之间的标度关系。已有充分证据表明，射电晕主要存在于最巨大的星系团中，这些星系团中主要并合产生的湍流能量可以重新加速相对论性电子并在兆秒差距尺度上放大磁场。MeerKAT 1.28 GHz深度观测揭示了8个星系团（27%）中存在弥散射电晕，而其余21个（70%）未探测到发射；另有一个星系团（3%）因数据质量差而被排除在射电分析之外。该高红移样本中的射电晕探测率低于中等红移样本，但仍高于理论模型在$z \gtrsim 1$时普遍预测的$\lesssim 10\%$发生率。探测到的射电晕围绕MMDCS样本最佳拟合的$P_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}}$-$M_{\rm 500c}^{\rm {Unc}}$关系分布，而未探测到的样本则位于射电功率-质量平面的低端包络线上，这与较低红移的趋势相似。未识别出星系团尺度的射电遗迹或迷你晕。我们的发现突显了MeerKAT探测最遥远星系团非热过程的能力，以及需要更深的低频巡天来揭示暗弱弥散射电辐射并检验$P_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}}$-$M_{\rm 500}$关系在宇宙时间上的持续性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：MeerKAT能探测最遥远星系团的非热过程，但需要更深的低频巡天来揭示暗弱弥散射电辐射，并检验$P_{1.4\,\mathrm{GHz}}$-$M_{\rm 500}$关系在宇宙时间上的持续性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The distribution of ACT SZ-selected clusters in mass and redshift (grey points), highlighting in red the 30 clusters observed with MeerKAT that meet the criteria \(z>1\) , \(M_{500c}>4.5\times 10^{14}\,{M_{\odot}}\) , and overlap with the DECaLS DR9 footprint. Dashed lines indicate the adopted selection boundaries. Six additional ACT clusters fall within the same mass and redshift range but lie outside the DECaLS footprint and were therefore excluded from the survey to maintain uniform optical coverage.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：ACT SZ选星系团在质量-红移空间中的分布（灰点），红色突出显示用MeerKAT观测的30个满足条件\(z>1\)、\(M_{500c}>4.5\times 10^{14}\,{M_{\odot}}\)且与DECaLS DR9覆盖区重叠的星系团。虚线表示采用的选边界。另有6个ACT星系团落在相同质量和红移范围内，但位于DECaLS覆盖区之外，因此被排除在巡天之外以保持均匀的光学覆盖。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Properties of the twenty four (24) MMDCS clusters analysed in this work. Clusters are listed in order of decreasing \(M_{{500c}}\) value. The first six clusters in the table (initially presented in P25) are also included here for completeness and are marked with an * . The last column gives the adopted diffuse radio-emission classification for each cluster.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本文分析的24个MMDCS星系团的属性。星系团按\(M_{{500c}}\)值降序排列。表中前6个星系团（最初在P25中介绍）也在此列出以保持完整性，并用*标记。最后一列给出每个星系团采用的弥散射电辐射分类。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Overview of the twenty three (23) MeerKAT 1.28 GHz observations used for the radio analysis in this work, summarising the main observational parameters and the full-resolution imaging properties. ACT-CL J2245.2 \(-\) 0433, although part of the full MMDCS sample, is excluded from this table because it was not included in the radio analysis due to poor data quality. Clusters are listed in order of decreasing \(M_{{500c}}\) value.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：本文射电分析中使用的23次MeerKAT 1.28 GHz观测的概述，总结了主要观测参数和全分辨率成像特性。ACT-CL J2245.2 \(-\) 0433虽然是完整MMDCS样本的一部分，但因数据质量差未纳入射电分析，故不包含在此表中。星系团按\(M_{{500c}}\)值降序排列。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: MeerKAT 1.28 GHz full-resolution images for each cluster. The projected physical scale at each cluster’s redshift is indicated in the top right of each panel. The synthesized beam is rendered as a filled white ellipse or circle at the lower left of each panel. The ACT SZ peak is labelled with a black or white cross, and the location of the BCG, obtained from ACT DR5 (Hilton et al., 2021 ) , is marked with a cyan triangle. The 3GC was applied to the following clusters to mitigate artefacts from bright sources and improve image fidelity: ACT-CL J0851, J0930, J0314, J0241, J0125, J1049, and J0113. The superimposed contours are from the low-resolution (LR) source-subtracted images, with contour levels set at \(\sigma_{{LR}}\times[3,6,10]\) . The LR images used for the contours have local rms values of \(1\sigma=5.5\,\upmu{Jy\,beam^{-1}}\) and \(9.4\,\upmu{Jy\,beam^{-1}}\) for ACT‑CL J0241.2–3916 and ACT‑CL J0113.9+1451, respectively. Contours are shown only for these two fields where faint diffuse emission is detected.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：每个星系团的MeerKAT 1.28 GHz全分辨率图像。每个星系团红移处的投影物理尺度在每个面板右上角标出。合成波束在每个面板左下角以填充的白色椭圆或圆形表示。ACT SZ峰值用黑色或白色十字标记，BCG位置（来自ACT DR5，Hilton等人，2021）用青色三角形标记。对以下星系团应用了3GC以减轻亮源伪影并提高图像保真度：ACT-CL J0851、J0930、J0314、J0241、J0125、J1049和J0113。叠加的等高线来自低分辨率（LR）源减图像，等高线水平设为\(\sigma_{{LR}}\times[3,6,10]\)。用于等高线的LR图像局部均方根值分别为ACT‑CL J0241.2–3916的\(1\sigma=5.5\,\upmu{Jy\,beam^{-1}}\)和ACT‑CL J0113.9+1451的\(9.4\,\upmu{Jy\,beam^{-1}}\)。仅在这两个探测到暗弱弥散射电辐射的天区显示等高线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: MeerKAT 1.28 GHz full-resolution images for each cluster. The projected physical scale at each cluster’s redshift is indicated in the top right of each panel. The synthesized beam is rendered as a filled white ellipse or circle at the lower left of each panel. The ACT SZ peak is labelled with a black or white cross, and the location of the BCG, obtained from ACT DR5 (Hilton et al., 2021 ) , is marked with a cyan triangle. The 3GC was applied to the following clusters to mitigate artefacts from bright sources and improve image fidelity: ACT-CL J0204, J2133, J1521, J1525, J0200, J2146, and J1139.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：每个星系团的MeerKAT 1.28 GHz全分辨率图像。每个星系团红移处的投影物理尺度在每个面板右上角标出。合成波束在每个面板左下角以填充的白色椭圆或圆形表示。ACT SZ峰值用黑色或白色十字标记，BCG位置（来自ACT DR5，Hilton等人，2021）用青色三角形标记。对以下星系团应用了3GC以减轻亮源伪影并提高图像保真度：ACT-CL J0204、J2133、J1521、J1525、J0200、J2146和J1139。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Measured properties of the detected diffuse emissions. Clusters are listed in order of decreasing \(M_{{500c}}\) value. The first six clusters in the table (initially presented in P25) are also included here for completeness and are marked with an * .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：探测到的弥散射电辐射的测量属性。星系团按\(M_{{500c}}\)值降序排列。表中前6个星系团（最初在P25中介绍）也在此列出以保持完整性，并用*标记。

figures.caption_en: Table 4: Summary of the host cluster properties and upper limit parameters for the eighteen (18) considered targets lacking detected diffuse emission. Clusters are listed in order of decreasing \(M_{{500c}}\) value.
figures.caption_zh: 表4：18个未探测到弥散射电辐射的候选目标的主星系团属性和上限参数总结。星系团按\(M_{{500c}}\)值降序排列。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: \(P_{1.4\,{GHz}}\) – \(M_{500c}^{{unc}}\) relation for the MMDCS sample. Circles show radio halos and diamonds indicate uncertain diffuse emission from this work, while inverted triangles mark \(3\sigma\) upper limits derived from the halo-injection analysis. The red dashed line shows the best-fitting scaling relation obtained with the scattr Bayesian regression, and the grey shaded region represents the 95 per cent confidence interval. Right: Comparison of the MMDCS sample with clusters from Cuciti et al. ( 2021b ) at \(0.089 Planck sample of Di Gennaro et al. ( 2021a ) at \(0.6 (Kale et al., 2025 ) . Blue squares denote radio halos and blue inverted triangles indicate upper limits from Cuciti et al. ( 2021b ) . Green diamonds show radio halos in the Di Gennaro et al. ( 2021a ) sample, and the yellow star marks El Gordo. Red circles represent radio halos from this work, orange diamonds indicate uncertain detections, and orange inverted triangles show upper limits. The black dashed line shows the scaling relation from Cassano et al. ( 2013 ) , while the green dot-dashed line denotes the relation from Cuciti et al. ( 2021b ) with its 95 per cent confidence region shown by the grey band, and the blue dotted line shows the best-fitting \(P_{1.4,{GHz}}\) – \(M_{500c}^{{unc}}\) relation derived for the MMDCS radio halos.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：MMDCS样本的\(P_{1.4\,{GHz}}\) – \(M_{500c}^{{unc}}\)关系。圆圈表示本文的射电晕，菱形表示不确定的弥散射电辐射，倒三角表示从晕注入分析得出的\(3\sigma\)上限。红色虚线表示使用scattr贝叶斯回归得到的最佳拟合标度关系，灰色阴影区域表示95%置信区间。右图：MMDCS样本与Cuciti等人（2021b）在\(0.089<z<0.183\)的样本、Di Gennaro等人（2021a）在\(0.6<z<0.9\)的Planck样本以及Kale等人（2025）在\(0.3<z<0.6\)的样本的比较。蓝色方块表示射电晕，蓝色倒三角表示Cuciti等人（2021b）的上限。绿色菱形表示Di Gennaro等人（2021a）样本中的射电晕，黄色星标记El Gordo。红色圆圈表示本文的射电晕，橙色菱形表示不确定探测，橙色倒三角表示上限。黑色虚线表示Cassano等人（2013）的标度关系，绿色点划线表示Cuciti等人（2021b）的关系及其95%置信区域（灰色带），蓝色虚线表示MMDCS射电晕的最佳拟合\(P_{1.4,{GHz}}\) – \(M_{500c}^{{unc}}\)关系。
